title: Food poisoning and other risks - Canada.ca
content:
## Food poisoning and other risks
Bacteria that can cause food poisoning, food-borne chemical contaminants, and toxins found in plants and animals.

## Services and information
Food poisoning from E. coli, salmonella and other bacteria, and related illnesses like botulism and hepatitis A.

### Chemical contaminants
Food-borne chemical contaminants and how Canada assesses their risks.
Natural toxins in plants and animals and how Canada monitors them in your food supply.
